description: India Book I, 43b. Power of attorney by Shemuel Ibn al-Lebdi from late tenth-early eleventh century Fustat. Shemuel appoints a man (only 'son of Ḥalfon' survives) to sue Nissim b. Yaʿaqov.
tags: IB1, power of attorney, India, ib-untranslated-eng
description_he: מסמך משפטי. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
